Short Title, , providing that sections 594–1 to 594–5 of this title be known as the “Forest Pest Control Act”, was repealed by , formerly § 13(a)(3), , , renumbered § 16(a)(3), , , .Act June 25, 1947, ch. 141, § 761 Stat. 177Pub. Construction, , providing that sections 594–1 to 594–5 of this title not be construed as limiting or repealing existing legislation, was repealed by , formerly § 13(a)(3), , , renumbered § 16(a)(3), , , .Act June 25, 1947, ch. 141, § 661 Stat. 177Pub. Plan for Control of Dutch Elm Disease, , , provided that the Secretary of Agriculture, in consultation with officials of both the States and political subdivisions thereof, conduct a study of the incidence of Dutch elm disease and evaluate methods for controlling the spread of such disease and submit a report on the results of such study to the President and the Congress on or before .Pub.
